title: Brain Briefing Room
prompt:
Design "NEXUS Brain Briefing Room", an AI workflow startup screen. 16:9 dark desktop app.
Main panel: Brain Situational Brief with sections "What I understand", "Workflow topology", "Current risks", "Missing context", "Questions for Sean". Left rail: loaded context sources with checkmarks: Contract, Runtime Evidence, Artifact History, Capability Inventory. Right rail: confidence meters and action buttons: Ask Brain, Generate Logic Graph, Propose Optimization.
Visual tone: calm command room, high trust, engineering dashboard, dense text blocks but readable, no fantasy imagery.

Rendering requirements: Generate a crisp browser-app UI concept mockup, landscape composition, no fake browser chrome, no illegible tiny lorem ipsum, make labels readable, align panels carefully, professional product design artifact for a technical architecture report.
